nodes.name: Daily 9PM Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 9:00 PM IST. Change the cron expression to change the time.

meta.description: Sends a daily sales summary to Telegram every evening at 9PM. Reads orders from Google Sheets and calculates total orders, revenue, and average order value. Setup: 1) Connect Google Sheets with your orders data 2) Set YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID 3) Add Telegram Bot credentials 4) Activate workflow
meta.author: Mehul Jhabak - github.com/mehul82099
